languages.text: {n}Данрок судорожно сглатывает воздух.{/n} "Повинуюсь Вашей Светлости и остаюсь на месте, пока на то ваша воля".

traits.locale_text: {n}Выпуклый лоб Данрока покрывается мелкой испариной.{/n} "Повинуюсь Вашей Светлости и остаюсь на месте, пока на то ваша воля".
traits.speaker: HighFactotum

languages.text: {n}Danrok gulps for air convulsively.{/n} "I obey Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship} and shall remain in place for as long as you will it."

languages.text: {n}Danrok traga saliva compulsivamente.{/n} «Cumpliré la voluntad de mi {mf|señor|señora} y permaneceré aquí hasta que usted lo diga».
languages.original_text: {n}Danrok gulps for air convulsively.{/n} "I obey Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship} and shall remain in place for as long as you will it."

traits.locale_text: {n}Danrok traga saliva compulsivamente.{/n} «Cumpliré la voluntad de mi {mf|señor|señora} y permaneceré aquí hasta que usted lo diga».

languages.text: {n}丹罗克猛地抽了一口气。{/n}“我遵从大人的命令，只要您吩咐，我就在这儿寸步不离。”
languages.original_text: {n}Danrok gulps for air convulsively.{/n} "I obey Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship} and shall remain in place for as long as you will it."

traits.locale_text: {n}丹罗克猛地抽了一口气。{/n}“我遵从大人的命令，只要您吩咐，我就在这儿寸步不离。”

languages.text: {n}Danrok déglutit à grand-peine.{/n} « Vos désirs sont des ordres, Votre Seigneurie, je ne bougerai pas d'ici sans votre autorisation. »
languages.original_text: {n}Danrok gulps for air convulsively.{/n} "I obey Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship} and shall remain in place for as long as you will it."

traits.locale_text: {n}Danrok déglutit à grand-peine.{/n} « Vos désirs sont des ordres, Votre Seigneurie, je ne bougerai pas d'ici sans votre autorisation. »

languages.text: {n}Danrok, kasılarak havayı yutkunuyor.{/n} "{mf|Lord|Leydi} Hazretleri'nin emrindeyim ve dilediğiniz sürece burada kalacağım."

languages.text: {n}ダンロクは激しく息を吸い込む。{/n}「{mf|閣下|閣下}のお言葉に従い、閣下のご意思の限り、この場にとどまります。」
languages.original_text: {n}Danrok gulps for air convulsively.{/n} "I obey Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship} and shall remain in place for as long as you will it."

traits.locale_text: {n}ダンロクは激しく息を吸い込む。{/n}「{mf|閣下|閣下}のお言葉に従い、閣下のご意思の限り、この場にとどまります。」

languages.text: {n}Danrok schnappt krampfhaft nach Luft.{/n} "Wie Ihr befehlt, Eure {mf|Lordschaft|Ladyschaft}. Ich werde bleiben, solange es Euch beliebt."
